chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D- 1539 of 2023 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 16.05.2024 Mr. Sikander Ali Junejo, Advocate for petitioners Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned AAG Sindh submits that a reference has been moved to the Commissioner Sukkur Division, Sukkur to look into the entries recorded in the record of rights in favour of petitioners. Counsel for petitioners submits that he would contest the same and move an application before the said Commissioner for demarcation of the lands during the said proceedings to avoid creation of law and order situation on the spot, because currently petitioners are in possession of the subject land which the private respondents are claiming to be their own. Learned AAG has no objection to it. Let petitioners move an application for demarcation of the land before the said Commissioner while contesting the reference on its own merits and the Commissioner shall decide the said application within a period of one month of its filing without fail. The petition is accordingly disposed of. Let a copy of this order be provided to learned AAG Sindh for compliance. Judge Judge ARBROHI
